mapper.select: SELECT U.user_seq, U.user_id, U.user_nm, U.mobile_no, U.tel_no, U.email, U.dept_nm, U.reg_dt, #{sysId} AS sys_id, 'IT 서비스데스크' AS sys_nm, 'Y' AS approval_yn FROM TB_USER_INFO U WHERE U.user_id = #{userId} AND U.user_pwd = #{userPwd}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS change_cnt FROM TB_USER_PWD_HIST WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reg_dt >= DATEADD(MM, -#{changeCycle}, GETDATE()) AND reg_dt <= GETDATE()
SELECT R.role_seq, R.role_code, R.role_nm, R.sys_id FROM TB_ROLE_INFO R JOIN TB_USER_ROLE_MAP RM ON R.role_code = RM.role_code AND R.sys_id = RM.sys_id WHERE RM.user_id = #{userId}
